description: Azure Network ImportData — VNet + subnets + NAT topology.

isByoVnet.description: True when the VNet is owned outside this stack.

natGatewayId.description: NAT gateway resource id when one was created.

networkSecurityGroupId.description: Network Security Group resource id attached to workload subnets.

subnetIds.description: Subnet resource ids in this VNet used by workloads.

vnetId.description:
VNet resource id (full ARM path). Absent when the controller
will look up the default VNet at runtime.
